condition: Low back strain, no red flags
ed_note_scrubbed: Adult with acute low back pain after lifting. Ambulatory. No fever. No trauma. No bowel or bladder symptoms. Normal strength and sensation in both legs. Discharged with supportive care.
Adult twisted ankle while walking. X-ray negative for fracture. Foot warm and well perfused. Sensation and movement intact. Discharged with brace and crutches as needed.

condition: Viral upper respiratory infection, no pneumonia
ed_note_scrubbed: Adult with cough, congestion, sore throat, and low-grade fever. Breathing comfortably. Oxygen saturation normal. Lung exam reassuring. No pneumonia suspected at discharge.
Adult nonpregnant patient with dysuria, urinary frequency, and urgency. No fever. No flank pain. No vomiting. Stable for discharge with oral antibiotic.

condition: Gastroenteritis, stable and able to hydrate
ed_note_scrubbed: Adult with vomiting and diarrhea. Abdomen soft without focal tenderness. No blood in stool. Improved after treatment and can drink fluids. Stable for discharge.
